title: rosa rugosa var. coruscans
intro: Rosa rugosa var. coruscans, also known as rugosa rose or Japanese rose, is a variant of the rugosa rose plant (Rosa rugosa), native to East Asia and known for its fragrant flowers and edible properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Rosa rugosa var. coruscans include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and its flowers, hips, and leaves can also be used in cooking and herbal remedies.
